ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the experiment started */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the experiment ended */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the experiment was conducted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator leading the experiment */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the experiment */,
  "collaborators" TEXT /* List of collaborating institutions or researchers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "harvests" (
  "harvest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each harvest */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the harvest belongs to */,
  "harvest_name" TEXT /* Name of the harvest */,
  "harvest_date" TEXT /* Date of the harvest */,
  "harvest_description" TEXT /* Description of the harvest */,
  "harvest_method" TEXT /* Method used for harvesting */,
  "harvest_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the harvest */,
  "estimated_yield" REAL /* Estimated yield before the actual measurements are taken */,
  "actual_yield" REAL /* Actual yield after the harvest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("harvest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_harvests_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plots" (
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plot */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the plot belongs to */,
  "plot_name" TEXT /* Name of the plot */,
  "plot_side" TEXT /* Side of the plot (e.g., COMPOSITE, NORTH, SOUTH) */,
  "plot_description" TEXT /* Description of the plot */,
  "plot_size" REAL /* Size of the plot in square meters */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil in the plot */,
  "irrigation_method" TEXT /* Method of irrigation used in the plot */,
  "fertilizer_used" TEXT /* Type and amount of fertilizer used in the plot */,
  "treatment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or treatments applied to the plot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plots_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crops" (
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop */,
  "crop_name" TEXT /* Common name of the crop */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the crop */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crop */,
  "variety" TEXT /* Variety of the crop */,
  "genetic_modification" TEXT /* Whether the crop is genetically modified */,
  "growth_cycle" INTEGER /* Typical growth cycle of the crop in days */,
  "disease_resistance" TEXT /* List of diseases the crop is resistant to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_parts" (
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant part */,
  "part_name" TEXT /* Name of the plant part */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plant part */,
  "part_type" TEXT /* Type of plant part */,
  "biological_function" TEXT /* Biological function of the plant part */,
  "part_size" REAL /* Typical size of the plant part */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the measurement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to take the measurement */,
  "measurement_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plot_measurements" (
  "plot_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plot measurement */,
  "plot_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the plot the measurement belongs to */,
  "harvest_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the harvest the measurement belongs to */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crop the measurement belongs to */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the plant part the measurement belongs to */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement type */,
  "measurement_amount" REAL /* Amount of the measurement */,
  "ss_e" REAL /* Standard error of the measurement (east) */,
  "ss_w" REAL /* Standard error of the measurement (west) */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the measurement */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plot_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plot_measurements_plot_id FOREIGN KEY ("plot_id") REFERENCES plots ("plot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plot_measurements_harvest_id FOREIGN KEY ("harvest_id") REFERENCES harvests ("harvest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plot_measurements_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES plant_parts ("part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plot_measurements_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plot_measurements_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
